description_long: This object is a metallic cylindrical tool with a ribbed black grip section and a robust, industrial design. The main body is silver-gray with a prominent, textured section near the top, likely for improved handling. A copper-colored segment is visible near the end, suggesting a reinforced or functional component. The front end is slightly flared and features a conical tip, but no drill bit is attached. There is a rectangular, ridged module on the side, possibly for control or adjustment. The overall construction appears solid and durable, suitable for heavy-duty urban or workshop use.
description: A metallic, cylindrical electric drill with a ribbed black grip, copper accents, and a robust, industrial design. No drill bit is attached, and a rectangular control module is visible on the side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, ribbed grip, copper segment, and rectangular control module on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the conical tip and circular end, with the ribbed grip visible along the length.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the ribbed grip and copper segment, with the control module now on the far side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the flat, circular end and the ribbed grip extending toward the front.
